arts.ttl: Predicted Scotland XI vs Portugal and team news as Steve Clarke eyes Nations League scalp to end miserable run
arts.sum: The Dark Blues will have a big home backing in Mount Florida on Tuesday night under the lights Our time at the major final didn't go to plan and it was ended at the group stage with results in the build-up and after not hitting the heights now expected of the national team.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo Said Fabio Paim was Better Than Him - What Happened Next?
arts.sum: In 2003, Manchester United star Cristiano Ronaldo said Fabio Paim was a better player than him but things did not work out that way.

arts.sum: It's a date with Cristiano Ronaldo and Co once again as Steve Clarke seeks an all important victory at Hampden

arts.ttl: Watch Scotland vs Portugal for FREE: Live stream, TV channel and kick-off time
arts.sum: The official Scotland National Team YouTube channel will also carry the coverage. Che Adams did have the ball in the net with the last kick of the ball but the celebrations didn't last with VAR ruling the goal out with the final whistle instantly following the decision.

arts.ttl: Clarke: Scotland can 'change whole mood' with result against Portugal
arts.sum: Steve Clarke believes Scotland can "change the mood about the place" with a positive result against Portugal in the Nations League on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Steve Clarke targets all-time Scotland record as he doubles down on his World Cup dream
arts.sum: Tuesday's Nations League clash with Portugal at Hampden will be the 61-year-old’s 62nd match in the dug out
